0.details:
I have known Lisa for longer than I can remember. Our mothers were really close friends so became friends before we learnt how to speak or walk
As we were growing up we shared our childhood, she is in almost every memory that I have growing up
Now, that we are in our thirties, as much as we have grown and evolved she is always my sister.
0.model_generation: Lisa, as I stand here today, I’m filled with gratitude for the nearly thirty years we’ve shared. From the moment our mothers introduced us before we could walk or speak, you’ve been woven into every chapter of my life. I still remember our sun-soaked summer afternoons racing through the yard, whispered secrets under the blanket fort, and laughter that echoed long after the day ended. Each memory reminds me how blessed I’ve been to grow up by your side. Now, in our thirties, life’s changes come faster and challenges grow tougher, yet you remain my steadfast sister in every sense. Your kindness, courage, and unwavering loyalty inspire me daily. So today, I raise my glass to you—my childhood companion, my confidante, and my forever sister. Happy birthday, Lisa. May this year bring you all the joy, love, and adventure you so richly deserve. Here’s to many more memories as we’ve always shared.
0.final_version:
Hello everyone! My name is Joe and I have known the birthday girl, Lisa, for as long as I can remember. Our mothers worked together and were really good friends so we were bound to become friends as well. We met before we learnt how to talk or walk, but a connection was formed and has never left since. As we were growing up, we went to school together and we almost shared a childhood as we were inseparable! We also shared a house while we were in college!
A lot of years have passed since, and we are still closer than ever. Lisa has really grown -I hope I also have- and I am very proud to call her my friend. I am looking forward to our next adventure and promise to always be by your side no matter what. Now let's all raise our glasses and wish her happy birthday.

1.details:
James, my high school friend, which I have not seen in a while
Helping my sister finf a house and hosting her while she was searching
It was very important because she was very stressed to be alone
1.model_generation:
Dear James,

It’s been too long since we last caught up, and I can’t thank you enough for everything you did for my sister recently. When she was feeling overwhelmed searching for a new home, you stepped in without hesitation—showing her houses and offering her a warm place to stay. Your generosity and hospitality turned a potentially isolating, anxious time into a manageable, even pleasant experience for her.

Knowing she had you to rely on meant the world to our family. Your kindness reminded me of our good high school days, and it’s been a joy to see you in action again. We’re both deeply grateful for your support and the comfort you provided her when she needed it most.

I hope we can reconnect soon and that I’ll have the chance to return the favor. Thank you for being such a wonderful friend.

With gratitude and friendship,
Your friend from high school
1.final_version:
Hello James,

I hope you are doing well ! My sister told me that you are in a really good place and that you seem very happy, and I am really glad for that.
I want to deeply thank you for helping her.
I know that we haven't seen each other since almost high school but I really appreciate that despite that fact, you were so helpful. 
Mia was really stressed about moving to Rome all by herself so the fact that not only you helped her look for a place but also you hosted her for two weeks made her feel very safe. I wanted to come there and help her as well but unfortunately I couldn't take the time off.
You are more than welcome to come to London and visit any time you want. 
I am planning to come to visit Mia next month so I hope I will see you soon!
Thank you once again, 
Susan.

2.details:
I have been thinking to visit my friend Jo, because I have really missed him.
I wanted to tell him that I got a PhD position.
I want to congratulate him on his marriage and ask him about it
2.model_generation:
Dear Jo,

I’ve been thinking about you a lot lately and wanted to reach out. I really miss our weekend hikes and late-night chats, and I’ve been hoping to come visit soon. I miss our long conversations and your witty sense of humor. I have some exciting news to share: I’ve accepted a PhD position starting this fall, and I can’t wait to dive into research.

Huge congratulations on your marriage! I’m so happy for you both. How has married life been? I’d love to hear all about the ceremony, your honeymoon plans, and how you’re settling into this new chapter together.

I’m planning to have some free time next month and would love to coordinate a visit. Let me know when you’re available, and we can plan something fun. It would be wonderful to catch up in person and celebrate both our milestones.

Take care, and talk soon!
2.final_version:
Dear Jo,

I’ve been thinking about you a lot lately and I wanted to tell you that I really miss the time we spent together. and I’ve been hoping to come visit soon. 
You really supported me in the master's we were doing together, and I wanted to tell you that I’ve accepted a PhD position!

I also wanted to say congratulations on your marriage!I’m so happy for you both. I am very sorry I didn't make it to the wedding.
How is everything? Are you enjoying married life?

I’m planning to have some free time next month and would love come visit. Let me know when you’re available, and we can go out for drinks!

Talk to you soon,
Mike

edits.removed: miss our long conversations and your witty sense of humor. I have some exciting news to share:
starting this fall, and I can’t wait to dive into research.
How has married life been? I’d love to hear all about the ceremony, your honeymoon plans, and how you’re settling into this new chapter together.
and we can plan something fun. It would be wonderful to catch up in person and celebrate both our milestones.

3.details:
I am really sorry for missing their birthday
I was in a lot of stress due to work, and I never got the invitation
I am planning a short holiday for us to catch up
3.model_generation:
Hello,

I want to apologize for missing your birthday celebration this year. I feel terrible for not being there to share in your special day. The truth is that I’ve been under a huge amount of stress at work lately, and in the chaos I never received the invitation. That’s no excuse, and I deeply regret that I let a mix-up on my end cost me the chance to celebrate with you.

You mean a lot to me, and I understand how important birthdays are. To make up for my absence and show how much I care, I’ve planned a short holiday for the two of us to catch up and create new memories together. I hope you’ll accept my sincere apology and join me for a weekend getaway. Thank you for your understanding and for being such a wonderful friend. I look forward to celebrating you properly very soon.

With heartfelt apologies,
3.final_version:
Hello,

I want to apologize for missing your birthday party! 
I feel terrible for not being there to spend this day together. 
The truth is that I’ve been under a huge amount of stress at work lately, and in the chaos I never received the invitation. 
The invitation letter never reached the house and your email went straight to spam.

You mean a lot to me, and I understand how important birthdays are. To make up for my stupidity, I was thinking of planning a short holiday for the two of us to catch up. 
I hope you will forgive me and join me for a weekend getaway. 
I promise we will have an amazing time !

Lots of love,
Dean

edits.removed: That’s no excuse, and I deeply regret that I let a mix-up on my end cost me the chance to celebrate with you.
absence and show how much I care,
I was thiking of I’ve planned

Thank you for your understanding and for being such a wonderful friend. I look forward to celebrating you properly very soon.

With heartfelt apologies,

4.details:
I met Mike in the first year of university
We bumped into each other when were where on holidays in Spain
We decided to stay there for some months and take a tour of the country
4.model_generation:
Today we gather to celebrate the life of Mike. I first met Mike during our freshman year of university, drawn together by shared classes and spontaneous laughter that filled every corridor. Years later, on a sunny afternoon in Spain, we bumped into each other in a plaza. That chance meeting reignited our friendship and led us to stay in Spain for months, touring the country’s winding roads, tasting its vibrant culture, and forging memories that glow in my heart.

Mike had an adventurous spirit that welcomed every new challenge with a grin. His kindness was unwavering, his curiosity contagious, and his loyalty a steady anchor in storms. Together we scaled mountains, wandered ancient streets, and savored conversations under starry skies.

Though Mike’s journey here has ended too soon, his legacy of warmth and wonder endures in the countless stories he left behind. Rest peacefully, friend—your light continues to guide us.
4.final_version:
Today we gather to rembember and share our memories of Mike.
 I first met Mike during our freshman year of university, we didn't talk much but we both felt that there was a connection.
Years later, on a sunny afternoon in Spain, we bumped into each other in a plaza. That chance started our friendship and led us to stay in Spain for months, creating amazing memories together that I will never forget.

Mike had an adventurous spirit and always pushed me to be the best version of myself. I will never forget the way he inspired me and how accepted and loved I felt by him.
Mike, may you rest in peace, and find new adventures.

edits.removed: , drawn together by shared classes and spontaneous laughter that filled every corridor
touring the country’s winding roads, tasting its vibrant culture, and forging memories that glow in my heart.

welcomed every new challenge with a grin. His kindness was unwavering, his curiosity contagious, and his loyalty a steady anchor in storms. Together we scaled mountains, wandered ancient streets, and savored conversations under starry skies.
Though Mike’s journey here has ended too soon, his legacy of warmth and wonder endures in the countless stories he left behind. Rest peacefully, friend—your light continues to guide us.

5.details:
I met Jim thought mutual friends and it felt like I have know him forever
We might not have been together for a very long time but our connection is very deep
We love to travel together and meet different cultures
5.model_generation: Jim, from the moment our friends introduced us, it felt as though I had known you forever. In the short time we have shared, our connection has deepened beyond anything I imagined. You are my constant companion on winding roads and bustling streets, my partner in exploring new lands and embracing unfamiliar cultures. With you, every sunrise feels like a promise, every sunset a celebration. I vow to support your dreams, to listen with an open heart, and to stand by your side through calm waters and stormy seas. I promise to nurture our bond with kindness, curiosity, and unwavering loyalty. I will cherish our laughter, hold you close, and greet each new day eager for the adventures that await us. To laugh with you in joy, to comfort you in sorrow, and to grow with you in love. Today, I give you my hand, my heart, and my love, for now and always.
5.final_version:
Jim, from the moment our friends introduced us, it felt as though I had known you forever. We were so similar in so many ways that surprised me a lot. 
In the short time we have shared, our connection has deepened beyond anything I imagined. 
You are my best friend and my partner in exploring new lands. 
With you, every sunrise feels like a promise, every sunset a celebration. I vow to support your dreams, to listen with an open heart, and to stand by your side through calm waters and stormy seas. I promise to nurture our bond with kindness, curiosity, and unwavering loyalty. I will cherish our laughter, hold you close, and greet each new day eager for the adventures that await us. To laugh with you in joy, to comfort you in sorrow, and to grow with you in love. Today, I give you my hand, my heart, and my love, for now and always.
I look forward to discovering the world with you by my side

edits.removed: n winding roads and bustling streets,
